goal: ROS2-MoveIt2 Franka pick-place. Standard topic_based_ros2_control topics /isaac_joint_states + /isaac_joint_commands. External MoveIt2 + cuMotion-as-MoveIt-OMPL-replacement plans the trajectory; Isaac Sim is the simulated robot. Validates Phase 6 M1.
thoughts: Wire ROS2 bridge with standard topic names via setup_ros2_control_compat.
Emit ros2_control YAML for user's outside-Kit launch (joint_trajectory_controller).
Verify form gate then function gate.
Note: agent should NOT run external 'ros2 launch' — that is the user's side. simulate_traversal_check measures Isaac-side cube delivery.
code:
precheck_ros2_environment()
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(robot_name="franka_panda", dest_path="/World/Franka", position=[0, 0, 0.75])
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.45, 0, 0.78], scale=[0.025, 0.025, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=['/World/Cube'],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, 0.4, 0.78], size=[0.15, 0.15, 0.10])
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path="/World/Franka", source_paths=["/World/Cube"], destination_path="/World/Bin", target_source="ros2_cmd")
setup_ros2_control_compat(robot_path="/World/Franka", controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller")
setup_ros2_bridge(profile="franka_moveit2", robot_path="/World/Franka")
emit_ros2_control_yaml(robot_path="/World/Franka", controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller", output_path="/tmp/cp87_ros2_control.yaml")
extension_notes: M1 ROS2 production parity variant of CP-01. Not in patched-set.
failure_modes: ROS2 topic name mismatch → external MoveIt2 sees no /joint_states
